story_summary: Referred to only as 'the clockmaker', Boxwell passes through Whitmoor repairing a music box; the story never uses his name.

entities.summary: A travelling clockmaker working through Whitmoor, known by trade rather than name.
entities.evidence_excerpt: "The clockmaker is here," the miller's wife called down the lane.

entities.summary: A mill village on Boxwell's circuit.
entities.evidence_excerpt: They did not use his name in Whitmoor.

claims.evidence_excerpt: The old clockmaker worked through the afternoon.

chunks.title: Continuity: The Old Clockmaker's Detour
chunks.body: Previous story summary: the clockmaker repaired a silent music box in Whitmoor and left without giving his name.
